sys_ui_page.description: 2025-01-22 Code Search DEPRECATED: Replaced Intrux Code Search Application THIS FILE WILL SOON BE DELETED
sys_ui_page.html:
var scopes = [{ sys_id: 'global', display_value: 'Global' }]; var scopeGr = new GlideRecordSecure('sys_scope'); scopeGr.addQuery('sys_class_name', 'sys_app') .addOrCondition('sys_class_name', 'sys_store_app'); scopeGr.orderByDesc('sys_created_on'); scopeGr.query(); while (scopeGr.next()) { scopes.push({ sys_id: scopeGr.getUniqueValue(), display_value: scopeGr.getDisplayValue() }); } const searchScripts = []; const prefGr = new GlideRecordSecure('sys_user_preference'); prefGr.addQuery('name', 'STARTSWITH', 'devops_code_search_script'); prefGr.addQuery('system', true).addOrCondition('user', gs.getUserID()); prefGr.addNotNullQuery('description'); prefGr.orderBy('name'); prefGr.query(); while (prefGr.next()) { searchScripts.push({ label: prefGr.description.toString(), value: prefGr.getUniqueValue() }); } const searchGroups = []; const searchGroupGr = new GlideRecordSecure('sn_codesearch_search_group'); searchGroupGr.orderByDesc('sys_updated_on'); searchGroupGr.setLimit(100); searchGroupGr.query(); while (searchGroupGr.next()) { searchGroups.push({ label: searchGroupGr.name.toString(), value: searchGroupGr.getUniqueValue() }); }

You are now on the Code Search dialog. Enter a search term to search files in any of your applications. You may optionally select a scope or search for files in all applications.

Tipp: If you know the Sys ID of a record, try using /sys_metadata.do?sys_id=SYSID or /task.do?sys_id=SYSID to open the record

results forin$[SP]
Search cancelled because too many results were found.
In progress
No Results Found
sys_ui_page.name: code_search

sys_update_version.name: sys_ui_page_067dd61197d32110d70ef207f053af83
sys_update_version.payload:
general configParams.table // group: => configParams.group = var typeAndConfig = config.split(':'); configParams[typeAndConfig[0]] = typeAndConfig.slice(1).join(':'); gel('searchDetail').innerHTML = '(aquire config)'; getSearchConfig(configParams, function (config) { if (config.tables.length) { var i = 0; searchTable(config.tables[i++], config.context, function processTableResults(result) { var percentageComplete = Math.floor(i / config.tables.length * 100); gel('progressPercentage').innerHTML = ' (' + percentageComplete + ')'; progressBar.setAttribute('aria-valuenow', percentageComplete); progressBar.style.width = percentageComplete + '%'; if (result.hits && result.hits.length) { hits += result.hits.length; gel('numResults').innerHTML = ' ' + hits + ' '; addTable(result.tableLabel, result.hits, true, term); } if (i < config.tables.length && !cancellationRequested) { searchTable(config.tables[i++], config.context, processTableResults, onError); } else { gel('progress-container').style.display = 'none'; gel('searchDetail').style.display = 'none'; if (cancellationRequested) { submitButton.removeAttribute('disabled'); cancelButton.removeAttribute('disabled'); searchInput.removeAttribute('disabled'); //canceled = true; cancellationRequested = false; } } }, onError); } }, onError); } }); function onError(error) { GlideUI.get().addOutputMessage({ type: 'error', msg: error ? error : 'Unknown Error occurred' }); if (!error) { try { throw __DUMMY__; } catch (e) { console.error(e, e.stack); } } } }); function updateButtonState(buttonNode, searchTerm) { if (searchTerm) { buttonNode.removeAttribute('disabled'); } else { buttonNode.setAttribute('disabled', 'disabled'); } } function addTable(tableName, hits, open, searchTerm) { var tableLi = document.createElement('li'); tableLi.classList.add('nav-group', 'project-group'); if (open) { tableLi.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true'); } else { tableLi.classList.add('collapsed'); tableLi.setAttribute('aria-expanded', false); } var toggleBar = document.createElement('div'); toggleBar.classList.add('toggle-bar', 'default-focus-outline'); toggleBar.setAttribute('tabindex', '0'); toggleBar.setAttribute('role', 'treeitem'); toggleBar.addEventListener('click', function (e) { e.stopPropagation(); tableLi.classList.toggle('collapsed'); tableLi.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(tableLi.classList.contains('collapsed'))); }); toggleBar.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'false'); toggleBar.innerHTML = ' ' + tableName + ' (' + hits.length + ')'; var hitsList = document.createElement('ul'); hitsList.classList.add('record-type-section'); hitsList.setAttribute('role', 'group'); hits.forEach(function (hit, i) { var hitLi = document.createElement('li'); hitLi.classList.add('nav-group', 'record-type-group'); if (i > 0) { hitLi.classList.add('collapsed'); hitLi.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true'); } var hitToggleBar = document.createElement('div'); hitToggleBar.classList.add('toggle-bar', 'default-focus-outline'); hitToggleBar.setAttribute('tabindex', '0'); hitToggleBar.setAttribute('role', 'treeitem'); hitToggleBar.addEventListener('click', function (e) { e.stopPropagation(); hitLi.classList.toggle('collapsed'); hitLi.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(hitLi.classList.contains('collapsed'))); }); var hitToggleBarTitle = document.createElement('span'); hitToggleBarTitle.classList.add('title'); var hitToggleBarTitleLink = document.createElement('a'); hitToggleBarTitleLink.classList.add('record-link'); hitToggleBarTitleLink.addEventListener('click', function (event) { event.stopPropagation(); window.open('nav_to.do?uri=%2F' + hit.className + '.do?sys_id=' + hit.sysId, '_blank'); }); hitToggleBarTitleLink.innerHTML = hit.name; var hitToggleBarTitleCount = document.createElement('span'); hitToggleBarTitleCount.classList.add('count'); hitToggleBarTitleCount.innerHTML = '(' + hit.matches.length + ')'; hitToggleBarTitle.append(hitToggleBarTitleLink); hitToggleBarTitle.append(hitToggleBarTitleCount); var toggleTrigger = document.createElement('i'); toggleTrigger.classList.add('toggle-trigger', 'icon', 'icon-vcr-right'); hitToggleBar.append(hitToggleBarTitle); hitToggleBar.append(toggleTrigger); var matchUl = document.createElement('ul'); matchUl.classList.add('file-section'); matchUl.setAttribute('role', 'group'); hit.matches.forEach(function (match) { var matchLi = document.createElement('li'); matchLi.classList.add('result-line'); var matchCode = document.createElement('pre'); matchCode.classList.add('javascript', 'hljs'); var lastLine = null; match.lineMatches .sort(function (a, b) { return a.line - b.line; }) .filter(function (match, pos, matches) { return matches.findIndex(m => m.line == match.line) == pos; }) .forEach(function (line) { if (lastLine && (lastLine < (line.line - 1))) { matchCode.append(document.createElement('br')); } lastLine = line.line; var lineSpan = document.createElement('span'); var numSpan = document.createElement('span'); numSpan.innerHTML = 'Line ' + line.line; var contentSpan = document.createElement('span'); contentSpan.innerHTML = line.context.replace(/&/g, '&').replace(//g, '>').replace(/"/g, '"').replace(/'/g, ''').replaceAll(searchTerm, function (part) { return '' + part + ''; }); lineSpan.append(numSpan, ': ', contentSpan, document.createElement('br')); matchCode.append(lineSpan); }); matchLi.append(' ' + match.fieldLabel + ': ', matchCode); matchUl.append(matchLi); }); hitLi.append(hitToggleBar, matchUl); hitsList.append(hitLi); }); tableLi.append(toggleBar, hitsList); document.getElementById('search-results').append(tableLi); } function getSearchConfig(params, onSuccess, onError) { // We do not use the OOTB api here because this app is shipped with tables that might not be present in this instance // -> in this case the OOTB api will break var ga = new GlideAjax('x_424426_devops.CodeSearchUtilClient'); ga.addParam('sysparm_name', 'getConfig'); ga.addParam('params', JSON.stringify(params)); ga.getXMLAnswer(function (result) { result = JSON.parse(result); if (result.status == 'success') { onSuccess(result); } else if (result.message) { onError(result.message); } else { onError(); } }); } function searchTable(tableConfig, sharedContext, onSuccess, onError) { let table = null; let context = null; if (typeof tableConfig == 'object') { table = tableConfig.name; context = { ...sharedContext, ...tableConfig }; } else { table = tableConfig; context = { ...sharedContext }; } gel('searchDetail').innerHTML = '(searching: ' + table + ')'; const ga = new GlideAjax('x_424426_devops.CodeSearchUtilClient'); ga.addParam('sysparm_name', 'searchTerm'); ga.addParam('table', table); ga.addParam('context', JSON.stringify(context)); ga.getXMLAnswer(function (result) { if (!result) { // a empty or null result indicates that the script include function crashed with in an unexpected error case // this needs to be investigates so we show an error to the user // those unexpected cases might happen due to invalid tables or ACL issues (instance specific) // for this reason we continue with an "best effort" mode as code search is not business critical if (!context.unexpectedSearchTableErrorOccurred) { context.unexpectedSearchTableErrorOccurred = true; GlideUI.get().addOutputMessage({ type: 'error', msg: 'searchTable returned null (check browser console log for affected tables)' }); } window.console.error('[DevOps+] CodeSearchUtilClient::searchTable failed for table', table); onSuccess({ tableLabel: table, hits: [] }); return; } result = JSON.parse(result); if (result.status == 'success') { onSuccess(result.search_result); } else if (result.missingHandlerMessage) { GlideUI.get().addOutputMessage({ type: 'error', msg: result.missingHandlerMessage }); onSuccess({ tableLabel: table, hits: [] }); } else if (result.message) { GlideUI.get().addOutputMessage({ type: 'error', msg: result.message }); onSuccess({ tableLabel: table, hits: [] }); } else { onError(); } }); }]]>2025-01-22 Code Search DEPRECATED: Replaced Intrux Code Search Application THIS FILE WILL SOON BE DELETEDfalsex_424426_devops_code_search.do var scopes = [{ sys_id: 'global', display_value: 'Global' }]; var scopeGr = new GlideRecordSecure('sys_scope'); scopeGr.addQuery('sys_class_name', 'sys_app') .addOrCondition('sys_class_name', 'sys_store_app'); scopeGr.orderByDesc('sys_created_on'); scopeGr.query(); while (scopeGr.next()) { scopes.push({ sys_id: scopeGr.getUniqueValue(), display_value: scopeGr.getDisplayValue() }); } const searchScripts = []; const prefGr = new GlideRecordSecure('sys_user_preference'); prefGr.addQuery('name', 'STARTSWITH', 'devops_code_search_script'); prefGr.addQuery('system', true).addOrCondition('user', gs.getUserID()); prefGr.addNotNullQuery('description'); prefGr.orderBy('name'); prefGr.query(); while (prefGr.next()) { searchScripts.push({ label: prefGr.description.toString(), value: prefGr.getUniqueValue() }); } const searchGroups = []; const searchGroupGr = new GlideRecordSecure('sn_codesearch_search_group'); searchGroupGr.orderByDesc('sys_updated_on'); searchGroupGr.setLimit(100); searchGroupGr.query(); while (searchGroupGr.next()) { searchGroups.push({ label: searchGroupGr.name.toString(), value: searchGroupGr.getUniqueValue() }); }

You are now on the Code Search dialog. Enter a search term to search files in any of your applications. You may optionally select a scope or search for files in all applications.

Tipp: If you know the Sys ID of a record, try using /sys_metadata.do?sys_id=SYSID or /task.do?sys_id=SYSID to open the record

]]>code_searchsys_ui_pageadmin2023-06-07 10:10:53067dd61197d32110d70ef207f053af8394code_search0b41a31b97cf2110d70ef207f053afb00b41a31b97cf2110d70ef207f053afb0sys_ui_page_067dd61197d32110d70ef207f053af83markus.kraus@intrux.ch2026-01-22 08:42:51067dd61197d32110d70ef207f053af83markus.kraus2024-11-04 13:40:0695f1acef836d5e100971c810feaad30f0markus.kraus2024-11-04 13:40:06sys_ui_page
